response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong craftsmanship, testing, and architecture skills, but the role specifically demands a C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threaded systems, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and a C++ bachelor thesis project; the bulk of recent experience is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No evidence of industrial automation, SDL/IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols like Modbus/OPC UA.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Distributed/high-throughput systems experience (microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Architecture, mentoring, and technical communication (workshops, talks, courses)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — last meaningful C/C++ role ended in 2015
No exposure to industrial automation, MQTT, or IEC 62443 / SDL security standards
Career trajectory is web/full-stack focused, not systems/embedded C++

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or SDL background
Strong distributed systems and engineering practices
